message:
Filter out OCSF v0.* versions from reference documentation

Change version regex to require major version >= 1, excluding legacy
pre-1.0 versions (v0.35.0, v0.36.0, v0.38.0) from the generated OCSF
reference documentation.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -62,7 +62,7 @@ runs:
 
         # Get all tags and filter to stable/dev versions
         # Formats: v1.0.0, v1.1.0, 1.3.0, 1.8.0-dev
-        TAGS=$(git tag -l | grep -E '^v?[0-9]+\.[0-9]+\.[0-9]+(-dev)?$' || true)
+        TAGS=$(git tag -l | grep -E '^v?[1-9][0-9]*\.[0-9]+\.[0-9]+(-dev)?$' || true)
 
         # Filter out -dev versions if not requested
         if [[ "$INCLUDE_DEV" != "true" ]]; then
